prompt: Ŋutsuwo katã le ku me. Kofi nye ŋutsu. Eya ta ...?
description: Syllogism: All men are mortal, Kofi is a man, therefore Kofi is mortal.

prompt: Ne nye xɔ 200 CFA, eye nye ƒle aɖa ba 150 CFA, ga kae susɔ?
Nu si le aƒe me, gake wònya aƒea?
description: Traditional Ewe riddle: What is in the house but knows the house? Answer: shadow (vuvɔ).

prompt: Xexeame ŋkeke: Dzoɖa, Brãɖa, Kuɖa, ... Ka ɖe?
description: Sequence: days of the week in Ewe. Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday, next is Thursday (Yawoɖa).

prompt: Meɖe ga 5000 CFA. Meƒle lã 2000 CFA, eye meƒle aɖa ba 1500 CFA. Ga kae susɔ?
Kofi ƒe dekɔnu le 1.70m, Yao ƒe nye 1.60m. Ameka wu?
description: Comparison: Who is taller? Kofi (1.70m) vs Yao (1.60m).

prompt: Ne tsi dza, anyigba aɖo. Ne tsi medza o, ekema anyigba ...?
description: Causality: If it rains, ground gets wet. If it doesn't rain, ground does not get wet.

prompt: Ame nye aƒe abe alesi lã nye ... ene.
description: Analogy: Person is to house as animal is to farm (agble).

prompt: Aʋa nye xɔ abe alesi afɔ nye ... ene.
description: Analogy: Door is to room as foot is to person (ame).

prompt: Lãwo katã wole agble me. Gake ave mele agble me o. Eya ta ave ...?
description: Syllogism with negation: All animals are in the farm. The forest is not in the farm. Therefore the forest is not an animal.

prompt: Ne nye xɔ ga 1000 CFA le Kofi si, eye mexe 200 CFA le Yao si, ne meƒle nu 1200 CFA, ga kae nye nye?
Kofi kple Ama. Wo dometɔ ɖeka nye ŋutsu, ɖeka nye nyɔnu. Ne Kofi nye nyɔnu o, ekema Ama nye ...?
description: Deduction: Kofi and Ama, one man one woman. If Kofi is not a woman, then Ama is a woman.
